title: Fake Plastic Trees
content:
[A]    A green plastic watering [F#m7]can
For a fake Chinese [E]rubber [D]plant

Who just [A]crumbles and [D]burns

For girls in the [E]eight[D]ies

She tastes like the [E]real [D]thing
My [A]fake plastic [D]love
[A]    But I can't help the [F#m7]feeling
I could blow through the [E]ceil[D]ing

It wears me [Bm7]out
It wears me [A]out

[Outro]

[A]All the time..

title: Time
content:
[Intro]
| [E]     |([E])    | [F#m]   |([F#m])  | x4
| [F#m]   |([F#m])  | [A]     |([A])    |
| [E]     |([E])    | [F#m]   |([F#m])  |

[Verse 1]
[F#m]Ticking away the moments that make up a dull [A]day
[E]Fritter and waste the hours in an offhand [F#m]way
[F#m]Kicking around on a piece of ground in your home[A]town
[E]Waiting for someone or something to show you the [F#m]way

[Chorus]
[Dmaj7]Tired of lying in the sunshine, [Amaj7]staying home to watch the rain
[Dmaj7]You are young and life is long, and [Amaj7]there is time to kill today
[Dmaj7]And then one day you [C#m7]find, ten years have got behind you
[Bm7]No one told you when to run ... [E]You missed the starting gun

[Guitar Solo]
[F#m] [A] [E] [F#m] x4
[Dmaj7] [Amaj7] [Dmaj7] [Amaj7] [Dmaj7] [C#m7] [Bm7] [E]

[Verse 2]
And you [F#m]run and you run to catch up with the Sun, but it's [A]sinking;
[E]Racing around to come up behind you a[F#m]gain.
The [F#m]Sun is the same in a relative way, but you're [A]older,
[E]shorter of breath, and one day closer to [F#m]death.
[Dmaj7]Every year is getting shorter, [Amaj7]never seem to find the time.
[Dmaj7]Plans that either come to naught, or [Amaj7]half a page of scribbled lines.
[Dmaj7]Hanging on in quiet desper[C#m7]ation is the English way.
The [Bm]time is gone, the [Bm7]song is over. [F/B]Thought I'd something more to say.
[Emadd9] [A] [Emadd9] [A]

[Verse 3]
[Em7]Home, home a[A7]gain
[Em7]I like to be here when I [A7]can
[Em7]When I come home, cold and [A7]tired
It's [Em7]good to warm my bones beside the [A7]fire
[Cmaj7]Far away, across the field
The [Bm7]tolling of the iron bell
[Fmaj7]Calls the faithful to their knees
[G]To hear the softly spoken [D7#9]magic [D7b9]spell [Bm]

title: Supersonic
content:
[Intro]
[F#m]         [A]  [B7]

[Verse]
I need to [F#m]be myself [A]  [B7]
I [F#m]can't be no one else [A]  [B7]
I'm [F#m]feeling supersonic, Give me [A]gin and [B7]tonic
[F#m]You can have it all but how [A]much do you [B7]want it?

[F#m]You make me laugh [A]  [B7]
[F#m]Give me your autograph [A]  [B7]
Can I [F#m]ride with you in your [A]B---M---[B7]W?
You can [F#m]sail with me in my [A]yellow subma[B7]rine

[Bridge]
You need to [E]find out
'Cos no one's gonna tell you what I'm [F#m]on about
You need to [E]find a way for what you want to say
[C#7] ...But before tomorrow

[Chorus/solo]
'Cuz [D]my friend [A]said he'd [E]take you [F#m]home
He [D]sits in a [A]corner [E]all a[F#m]lone
[D]He lives [A]under a [E]water[F#m]fall
[D]Nobody can [A]see him, [E]Nobody can ever [F#m]hear him call

And she [F#m]makes me laugh [A]  [B7]

No one's gonna tell her what I'm [F#m]on about

title: Wish You Were Here
content:
[Verse 1]
[C]  So, so you think you can [D/F#]tell,
[Am/E]Heaven from Hell, blue skies from [G]pain.
Can you tell a green [D/F#]field from a cold steel [C]rail, a smile from a [Am]veil,
Do you think you can [G]tell?

[Verse 2]
Did they get you to [C]trade your heroes for [D/F#]ghosts,
[Am/E]Hot ashes for trees, hot air for a cool [G]breeze, cold comfort for [D/F#]change,
And did you ex[C]change a walk on part in the [Am]war for a lead role in a [G]cage?

[Instrumental]
[Em7] [G] [Em7] [G] [Em7] [A7sus4] [Em7] [A7sus4] [G]

[Verse 3]
[C]  How I wish, how I wish you were [D/F#]here.
We're just [Am/E]two lost souls swimming in a fish bowl, [G]year after year,
[D/F#]    Running over the same old [C]ground. What have we found?
The [Am]same old fears. Wish you were [G]here!

title: Time
content:
[Verse 1]
[Em]Ticking away the moments that make up a dull [G]day
[D]Fritter and waste the hours in an offhand [Em]way
[Em]Kicking around on a piece of ground in your home[G]town
[D]Waiting for someone or something to show you the [Em]way

[Chorus]
[Cmaj7]Tired of lying in the sunshine, [Gmaj7]staying home to watch the rain
[Cmaj7]You are young and life is long, and [Gmaj7]there is time to kill today
[Cmaj7]And then one day you [Bm7]find, ten years have got behind you
[Am7]No one told you when to run ... [D]You missed the starting gun

[Guitar Solo]
[Em] [G] [D] [Em] x4
[Cmaj7] [Gmaj7] [Cmaj7] [Gmaj7] [Cmaj7] [Bm7] [Am7] [D]

[Verse 2]
And you [Em]run and you run to catch up with the Sun, but it's [G]sinking;
[D]Racing around to come up behind you a[Em]gain.
The [Em]Sun is the same in a relative way, but you're [G]older,
[D]shorter of breath, and one day closer to [Em]death.
[Cmaj7]Every year is getting shorter, [Gmaj7]never seem to find the time.
[Cmaj7]Plans that either come to naught, or [Gmaj7]half a page of scribbled lines.
[Cmaj7]Hanging on in quiet desper[Bm7]ation is the English way.
The [Am]time is gone, the [Am7]song is over. [D#/A]Thought I'd something more to say.
[Dmadd9] [G] [Dmadd9] [G]

[Verse 3]
[Dm7]Home, home a[G7]gain
[Dm7]I like to be here when I [G7]can
[Dm7]When I come home, cold and [G7]tired
It's [Dm7]good to warm my bones beside the [G7]fire
[A#maj7]Far away, across the field
The [Am7]tolling of the iron bell
[D#maj7]Calls the faithful to their knees
[F]To hear the softly spoken [C7#9]magic [C7b9]spell [Am]

title: Can't Stop
content:
[Verse 1]
[Em]Can't stop, addicted to the shindig 
[D]Chop top, he says I'm gonna win big 
[Bm]Choose not a life of imitation 
[C]Distant cousin to the reservation 
[Em]Defunct, the pistol that you pay for 
[D]This punk, the feeling that you stay for 
[Bm]In time I want to be your best friend 
[C]Eastside love is living on the westend 
[Em]Knocked out, but boy you better come to 
[D]Don't die, you know the truth as some do 
[Bm]Go write your message on the pavement 
[C]Burn so bright, I wonder what the wave meant 
[Em]White heat is screaming in the jungle 
[D]Complete the motion if you stumble 
[Bm]Go ask the dust for any answers 
[C]Come back strong with 50 belly dancers 

[Chorus]
[G]The world I love
[D]The tears I've dropped
[Bm]To be part of
[C]the wave can't stop
[G]Ever wonder [D]if it's [Bm]all for [C]you
[G]The world I love
[D]The trains I hop
[Bm]To be part of
[C]The wave can't stop
[G]Come and tell me [D]when it's [Bm]time [C]to

[Verse 2]
[Em]Sweetheart is bleeding in the snowcone 
[D]So smart, she's leading me to ozone 
[Bm]Music, the great communicator 
[C]Use two sticks to make it in the nature 
[Em]I'll get you into penetration 
[D]The gender of a generation 
[Bm]The birth of every other nation 
[C]Worth your weight, the gold of meditation 
[Em]This chapter's going to be a close one 
[D]Smoke rings, I know you're going to blow one 
[Bm]All on a spaceship, persevering 
[C]Use my hands for everything but steering 
[Em]Can't stop the spirits when they need you 
[D]Mop tops are happy when they feed you 
[Bm]Jay butterfly is in the treetop 
[C]Birds that blow the meaning into bebop

[Chorus]
[G]The world I love
[D]The tears I've dropped
[Bm]To be part of
[C]the wave can't stop
[G]Ever wonder [D]if it's [Bm]all for [C]you
[G]The world I love
[D]The trains I hop
[Bm]To be part of
[C]The wave can't stop
[G]Come and tell me [D]when it's [Bm]time [C]to

[Interlude]
[Em]Wait a minute, I'm [D]passing out, [Bm]win or lose, [C]just like you
[Em]Far more shockin' than [D]anything I [Bm]ever knew, [C]how 'bout you
[Em]Ten more reasons why I [D]need somebody [Bm]new, [C]just like you
[Em]Far more shockin' than [D]anything I [Bm]ever knew, [C]right on cue

[Break]
[Em] [D] [Bm] [C]

[Verse 3]
[Em]Can't stop, addicted to the shindig 
[D]Chop top, he says I'm gonna win big 
[Bm]Choose not a life of imitation 
[C]Distant cousin to the reservation 
[Em]Defunct, the pistol that you pay for 
[D]This punk, the feeling that you stay for 
[Bm]In time I want to be your best friend 
[C]Eastside love is living on the westend 
[Em]Knocked out, but boy you better come to 
[D]Don't die, you know the truth as some do 
[Bm]Go write your message on the pavement 
[C]Burn so bright, I wonder what the wave meant 
[Em]Kick start the golden generator 
[D]Sweet talk but don't intimidate her 
[Bm]Can't stop the Gods from engineering 
[C]Feel no need for any interfering 
[Em]Your image in the dictionary 
[D]This life is more than ordinary 
[Bm]Can I get two, maybe even three of these?
[C]Comin' from space to teach you of the Pleiades 
[N.C.]Can't stop the spirits when they need you
[N.C.]This life is more than just a read-thru

title: Hey Joe
content:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]

[C]  I’m goin’ down to [G]shoot my old lady,

Huh! And that ain’t [E]too cool.

You shot her down [E]now,

You shot her down in the [E]ground, Yeah”

Uh, [C]yes I [G]did, I shot her.

And I gave her the [E]gun, I shot her.
